content:
type: STATUS
files: outlines/prompts.py
summary: Added filters param to prompt decorator, Prompt.from_str/from_file, and new create_jinja_env(loader, filters) helper that centralizes env creation; done editing, tests pass. Let me know how your global registry hooks in so we don't clobber each other.

fields.summary: Added filters param to prompt decorator, Prompt.from_str/from_file, and new create_jinja_env(loader, filters) helper that centralizes env creation; done editing, tests pass. Let me know how your global registry hooks in so we don't clobber each other.

content:
type: ANSWER
files: outlines/prompts.py
summary: Sounds good — create_jinja_env(loader, filters) applies builtins then filters via env.filters.update(filters) last, so it naturally supports layering a global registry before it and my local filters param stays the final override. Wrapping up my patch now.
